description: Squarespace is a website-building and ecommerce platform for creating and hosting sites, stores, and related online content. Its developer offerings include commerce data access for merchant sites and tooling for custom template development.
summary: Squarespace exposes a REST Commerce API at api.squarespace.com authenticated by bearer API keys or OAuth access tokens, plus a published npm CLI for local template development; no first-party GraphQL API or MCP server was found.
